metadata.raw_prompt: Seamless light gray-white low-pile office carpet texture, subtle short fiber, bright clean airy modern tech office floor, flat refined minimal material, no seams, no square grid lines, no objects, no dirt, no dark shading, no cube, no raised block.

prompt_result.raw_prompt: Seamless light gray-white low-pile office carpet texture, subtle short fiber, bright clean airy modern tech office floor, flat refined minimal material, no seams, no square grid lines, no objects, no dirt, no dark shading, no cube, no raised block.

metadata.generation_prompt:
Generate the following texture tile in the bottom-right cell of reference image 1: “seamless light gray low-pile carpet.”
Reference image 1 is the strict layout and style guide: keep its grid layout, bottom-right target cell, pixel scale, simple texture density, and overall pixel-art style.
Retro pixel art style, flat, 16-bit color palette, keep both textures and colors uniform and simple.

prompt.stage1: 沿着纹理的走向补全空白，不要修改空白以外的画面。
prompt.stage2: 沿着纹理的走向补全空白，不要修改空白以外的画面。

stage2_generation_attempts.prompt: 沿着纹理的走向补全空白，不要修改空白以外的画面。

operator_config.prompt:
Generate the following texture tile in the bottom-right cell of reference image 1: “seamless light gray low-pile carpet.”
Reference image 1 is the strict layout and style guide: keep its grid layout, bottom-right target cell, pixel scale, simple texture density, and overall pixel-art style.
Retro pixel art style, flat, 16-bit color palette, keep both textures and colors uniform and simple.
